user.title: 2N Intercom Setup - Connection
user.description: Configure connection to your 2N Intercom device

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the intercom (e.g., 192.168.1.100)
data_description.port: HTTP/HTTPS port on the device (leave default unless changed)
data_description.protocol: Use HTTP or HTTPS based on device configuration
data_description.username: Device login username for API access
data_description.verify_ssl: Enable only if the HTTPS certificate is trusted by Home Assistant

data_description.name: Displayed name in Home Assistant
data_description.enable_camera: Create the camera entity for snapshots and streaming
data_description.enable_doorbell: Create the doorbell entity for ring detection
data_description.relay_count: How many relays you want to configure (0-4)
data_description.called_id: Select which account should ring. Choose All calls to ring on every button.

data_description.relay_number: Physical relay number on the device (1-4)
data_description.relay_device_type: Door creates a switch, gate creates a cover

relay_pulse.title: 2N Intercom Setup - Relay {relay_number} pulse
relay_pulse.description: How long to activate relay {relay_number} ({device_type}). Door strikes typically need ~2000 ms, swing-gate triggers ~15000 ms.

data_description.relay_pulse_duration: Trigger pulse length sent to the relay (ms)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Please check the IP address, port, and credentials.

abort.already_configured: This 2N Intercom device is already configured.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the intercom
data_description.protocol: Use HTTP or HTTPS based on device configuration
data_description.username: Device login username for API access
data_description.verify_ssl: Enable only if the HTTPS certificate is trusted

data_description.name: Displayed name in Home Assistant
data_description.scan_interval: How often the integration polls the device for status (2-300 s). Lower values detect rings faster but increase device load.
data_description.relay_count: How many relays you want to configure (0-4)
data_description.called_id: Select which account should ring. Choose All calls to ring on every button.

camera.title: 2N Intercom Options - Camera
camera.description: Tune how Home Assistant streams video from the 2N camera. Lower MJPEG resolution and frame rate dramatically reduce bandwidth on continuously visible dashboards.

data_description.live_view_mode: auto picks RTSP if available, then MJPEG, then JPEG snapshots only
data_description.camera_source: Which sensor on the device to stream — internal is the built-in lens; external is a secondary camera module if fitted
data_description.mjpeg_width: Width of the MJPEG stream requested from the device (e.g. 640)
data_description.mjpeg_height: Height of the MJPEG stream requested from the device (e.g. 480)
data_description.mjpeg_fps: Frames per second for the MJPEG stream (1-15)

data_description.relay_number: Physical relay number on the device (1-4)
data_description.relay_device_type: Door creates a switch, gate creates a cover

relay_pulse.title: 2N Intercom Options - Relay {relay_number} pulse
relay_pulse.description: How long to activate relay {relay_number} ({device_type}). Door strikes typically need ~2000 ms, swing-gate triggers ~15000 ms.

data_description.relay_pulse_duration: Trigger pulse length sent to the relay (ms)

answer_call.name: Answer call
answer_call.description: Answer the active 2N Intercom call session or a specific session.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Target a specific 2N Intercom config entry when more than one is loaded.

session_id.name: Session ID
session_id.description: Override the active call session to answer.

hangup_call.name: Hang up call
hangup_call.description: Hang up the active 2N Intercom call session or a specific session.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Target a specific 2N Intercom config entry when more than one is loaded.

session_id.name: Session ID
session_id.description: Override the active call session to hang up.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Hangup reason sent to the device.
